title: Finite Predicate Logic

solver_reuse.target: finite predicate quantifier-expansion Bool/CNF DRAT/LRAT regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Finite-domain quantifier expansion over U={a,b}: forall x. P(x) forces P(a) and P(b), while failure of exists x. P(x) forces not P(a) and not P(b).
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional predicate-logic rows only when they add distinct finite expansion, relation-table, or equality/congruence solver pressure; keep arbitrary-domain validity, completeness, compactness, and Lowenheim-Skolem-style theorems in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite quantifier expansion as deterministic Axeyum Bool/SAT terms.
Replay finite witnesses and counterexamples through Axeyum model evaluation.
Keep the forall-implies-exists finite UNSAT row tied to source-linked CNF plus checked DRAT/LRAT evidence.
Emit checked CNF/LRAT or Alethe evidence for additional finite UNSAT rows only when they add distinct solver pressure.
Keep unbounded first-order validity and semantic completeness under a Lean-horizon route until a kernel-checked artifact exists.
